title: Claude Ads — Audit Agent Output
description: Canonical output schema every audit-* agent must emit alongside its human-readable markdown. The orchestrator (`ads/SKILL.md`) parses these JSON files to aggregate the cross-platform Ads Health Score. Adding a new audit platform = produce JSON that validates against this schema.

platform.description: Which audit produced this result. Must match the agent's `name` minus the `audit-` prefix.

version.description: Schema version this document conforms to (e.g. "1.0"). Bump on breaking schema changes.

generated_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when the audit completed.

account_id.description: Optional platform-native account identifier (e.g. Meta ad_account_id, Google CID). Null if audit ran on manual exports.

data_source.description: How the audit obtained its source data. "mcp" means live platform API via MCP server.

health_score.description: Weighted aggregate score for this platform/dimension. See `scoring-system.md`.

grade.description: Letter grade derived from health_score (A:90-100, B:75-89, C:60-74, D:40-59, F:<40).

checks.description: All checks evaluated, in order. Skipped checks should be included with result "N/A".

id.description: Stable check identifier (e.g. G01, M-AT1, T-PI2, X-PI1). Letters identify platform/family.

finding.description: What was observed in the data.

evidence.description: Optional structured evidence (metric values, screenshots paths, MCP tool responses).

quick_wins.description: Subset of checks with severity in {critical, high} AND fix_time_minutes <= 15. Sorted by impact.

critical_issues.description: Checks that failed at severity "critical". These block the platform from scoring above C until fixed.

notes.description: Free-form notes for the orchestrator or human reviewer.
